title: Fix proposal-task drift warnings for narrative proposal sections

tasks.title: Add failing regression tests for narrative proposal sections not emitting PROPOSAL_TASK_DRIFT and explicit task-bearing sections still detecting drift.
tasks.verification: Added failing RED regression for narrative proposal sections not emitting PROPOSAL_TASK_DRIFT plus explicit Tasks section still warning. RED confirmed: narrative test failed before implementation; after implementation focused validator tests pass.
tasks.summary: Extended contract.test.ts with validateProposalDrift helper and two regression cases: narrative sections ignored, explicit task-bearing section warns when unmatched.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended contract.test.ts with validateProposalDrift helper and two regression cases: narrative sections ignored, explicit task-bearing section warns when unmatched.

tasks.title: Implement structural task-bearing section detection for proposal drift validation.
tasks.verification: Implemented structural task-bearing section detection by replacing broad header keyword heuristic with allowlist of explicit task/work-plan headers. Narrative sections no longer participate in drift validation; explicit Tasks/Planned Tasks/Implementation Tasks/Work Items/Work Plan remain checked.
tasks.summary: Updated runProposalDriftCheck to gate checks on explicit task-bearing headers only and clarified function documentation.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated runProposalDriftCheck to gate checks on explicit task-bearing headers only and clarified function documentation.

tasks.title: Run focused validator tests and plugin check; document verification evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm vitest run src/validator/contract.test.ts --reporter=verbose; pnpm run check

wisdom.content: Proposal-task drift validation should be opt-in to structurally task-bearing sections (Tasks, Planned Tasks, Implementation Tasks, Work Items, Work Plan), not opt-out from narrative headers. Header keyword matching over arbitrary proposal sections creates false positives on Intent/Scope/coordination prose.

proposal.approval_evidence: Batch accepted by user in OpenCode chat; structured GH response posted.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed autonomously from issue #73, proposal, and observed validator warnings in active changes. This is a drift-validator false-positive bug; no HITL tradeoff/conflict detected.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan adds structural task-bearing section detection with regression coverage for narrative false positives and real drift.

planning.approval_evidence: Approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #73.

execution.approval_evidence: Implemented proposal-task drift fix. Narrative proposal sections are no longer considered task-bearing; explicit task/work-plan sections still warn on unmatched tasks. Verification: RED focused test failed before implementation; GREEN pnpm vitest run src/validator/contract.test.ts --reporter=verbose passed; pnpm run check passed. Checkpoint commit 4df0572c30ae83d76ba08faaaa8dabc7614471eb.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

release.approval_evidence: Release/archive approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #73.

reentry_history.reason: ATC protocol correction: release/archive sign-off is separate HITL and must be deferred to GitHub; acceptance approval did not explicitly approve release/archive.
reentry_history.scope_delta: No scope change. Reset release gate to await structured GitHub release approval.
